SHORT NAME: MDCD_MDCLY_NDY_CVRG_ABD_POP_IND 
LONG NAME: MDCD_MDCLY_NDY_CVRG_ABD_POP_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This data element is triggered by a value of “59”–“60” in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD. 
These values are: 
59 = Medically Needy Aged, Blind or Disabled 
60 = Medically Needy Blind or Disabled Individuals Eligible in 1973
